Item.Text: 0x09 : illegal change of locked bits in PLL configuration registers
0x19 : a branch to a an unimplemented exception vector has occured
0x21 : unplausible case of ASDdc parameter set selection
0x23 : unplausible case of ASDrf parameter set selection
0x24 : Bypass: stopped by ASCETSD or timeout
0x25 : an error in CoEng_ShOff state machine has occured
0x26 : Default state of engine state machine reached
0x27 : default case of glow control state machine
0x28 : Recovery with full test extent which is triggerd after 3 other recoveries
0x29 : Unplausible number of cylinders in EngM_numCyl
0x2B : after amplifier trimming of CY370 an error ampl_err'isdetected'
0x2D : error in CY370 clock monitoring done by HWE
0x2F : error in CY370 RAM test done by HWE
0x36 : unplausible case of switch stExch in function NVC_InitEEPROMData
0x37 : default state of injector quantity adjustment
0x3A : unplausible case of switch NUM_BITS*numPath + numBit
0x3C : unplausible case of LIGov parameter set selection
0x3D : default state of setpoint calculation of metering unit has occured
0x3E : Cyclic RAM check of memory monitoring failed
0x3F : Cyclic ROM check of memory monitoring failed
0x43 : MON: TPU Code emulation RAM cecksum failure detected
0x45 : unplausible case of CAN baudrate and electrical architecture
0x4C : Operating system: time table already active
0x4D : Operating system: argument out of range
0x4E : Plausibility error in engine speed check
0x4F : Energising time exceeds limit of overrun monitoring
0x50 : default state of setpoint calculation of PCV has occured
0x51 : default case of set point tracking
0x52 : default state of rail pressure sensor offset state has occured
0x53 : default state of rail pressure governor state machine has occured
0x55 : default state of ramping during start was reached
0x56 : default state of engine coordinator was reached
0x57 : default state of starting cut out monitoring was reached
0x58 : Default state of turbocharger cooling pump machine was reached

Label.Text: Resolution of the "masse de suie" variation : 1.6g
Trigger : kilometric definition by the calibration PFlt_lPFltDrvRec_C
Resolution of the "Simulated Soot Mass" variable : 1.6g
- Record n°1 is the most recent. - Record n°20 is the oldest
- Le Km Rec[p] = Km Rec[1] - somme des délta de 2 à p
Resolution of the Driven Distance(Travel Distance) variation is from 2 Km
- Record n°1 is the most recent. - Record n°10 is the oldest
- Le Km Rec[p] = Km Rec[1] - somme des délta de 2 à p
Resolution of the "Travel Distance " variation : 20 km
Trigger : entree dans l'etat "regeneration failure" (0x50) Et sans Regeneratioin partielle
Trigger : Entree dans l'etat "Speed request" (0x08) ET Front Montant de PFlt_stSpReqDrvRec_mp
